outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: Trump says he will extend ceasefire with Iran until negotiations conclude — Iran's new supreme leader nowhere to be seen
outlets.summary: CNN covers Trump's same-day reversal on ceasefire extension. Separate analysis explores Mojtaba Khamenei's absence — 6+ weeks without public appearance, AI-generated videos used.

outlets.name: Washington Post
outlets.headline: What to know as ceasefire in the Iran war hangs in the balance
outlets.summary: WaPo analysis of the evolving ceasefire dynamics as Trump reverses course and extends indefinitely while maintaining the blockade.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Trump accuses Iran of ceasefire violations, extends ceasefire indefinitely
outlets.summary: Fox News liveblog covers Trump's reversal from threatening bombing to indefinite ceasefire extension. Focus on Iran's 'fractured' government.

outlets.name: RedState
outlets.headline: Iran War pushes gas past $4 — US still paying far less than most countries
outlets.summary: Coverage framing US gas prices as painful but noting Americans pay less than European allies hit harder by the Hormuz blockade.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Iran war updates: Trump extends ceasefire as Pakistan talks in disarray — Four scenarios for what's next
outlets.summary: Al Jazeera liveblog covers Trump's indefinite ceasefire extension, Iran's refusal to attend talks, and publishes four scenarios analysis for the conflict's next phase.

outlets.name: NPR
outlets.headline: Trump extends U.S. ceasefire with Iran at Pakistan's request
outlets.summary: NPR reports on Trump's indefinite ceasefire extension made at the request of Pakistan's PM Sharif and Army Chief Munir.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: Israel doubts prospects of Iran deal, coordinating potential attack plans with US — Netanyahu: ceasefire 'not the end'
outlets.summary: Times of Israel reports Israel is preparing for post-ceasefire military action, coordinating target bank with US. Netanyahu at Independence Day: 'stronger than ever.'

outlets.name: Jerusalem Post
outlets.headline: US-Iran ceasefire extended until Iranian officials submit 'unified proposal'
outlets.summary: JPost covers Trump's indefinite ceasefire extension and its implications for Israeli military planning.

outlets.name: Press TV
outlets.headline: Trump unilaterally extends truce as Iran rejects talks amid threats, blockade
outlets.summary: Press TV frames Trump's ceasefire extension as an admission of US weakness, emphasizing Iran's refusal to negotiate 'under threat' and calling the blockade an act of war.

outlets.name: Tehran Times
outlets.headline: Iran rejects pressure as US maritime terrorism casts ominous cloud over diplomacy
outlets.summary: Coverage of Tifani seizure as 'maritime terrorism' and Araghchi's condemnation of US blockade as 'act of war' and ceasefire violation.
